basic_details.job_title: MoEF&CC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Scientific Consultant / Non-Scientific Consultant Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change (MoEF&CC)

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Environmental Science or Environmental Engineering or Marine Science or Marine Engineering or Water resources or B.E/B. Tech, PhD, MPhil, M. Tech, MSc (desirable for scientific posts), PhD/MPhil/M. Tech/MSc. in GeoInformatics/Geospatial Science & Technology, Remote sensing & GIS (desirable for Grade-II)
qualification.details: Scientific Consultant Grade-IV: Master's degree in Environmental Science or Environmental Engineering or Marine Science or Marine Engineering or Water resources or B.E/B. Tech. Desirable: PhD, MPhil, M. Tech, MSc. Experience: More than 20 Years. Scientific Consultant Grade-II: Master's degree in Environmental Science or Environmental Engineering or Marine Science or Marine Engineering or Water resources or B.E/B. Tech. Desirable: PhD/MPhil/M. Tech/MSc. in GeoInformatics/Geospatial Science & Technology, Remote sensing & GIS. Experience: More than 10 and up to 16 years. Scientific Consultant Grade-I: Master's degree in Environmental Science or Environmental Engineering or Marine Science or Marine Engineering or Water resources or B.E/B. Tech. Desirable: PhD, MPhil, M. Tech, MSc. Experience: More than 5 Years and up to 10 years. Non-Scientific Consultant A: Master's degree in Environmental Science or Environmental Engineering or Marine Science or Marine Engineering or Water resources or B.E/B. Tech or Retired Government employees with grade pay of Rs 4600/- and above and knowledge of MS Office. Experience: More than 3 Years and upto 5 years. Non-Scientific Research Associate: Master's degree in Environmental science or Environmental Engineering or B.E/B. Tech. Experience: 1-3 Years.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for MoEF&CC Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for MoEF&CC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the MoEF&CC Scientific Consultant / Non-Scientific Consultant posts is 10-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the MoEF&CC Consultant posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for Scientific Consultant and Non-Scientific Consultant positions announced by the Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the MoEF&CC recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary range for the consultant positions?
faq.answer: The salary for the consultant positions ranges from Rs. 40,000/- to Rs. 1,75,000/- per month, depending on the post and experience.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications include a Master's degree in relevant fields like Environmental Science, Engineering, Marine Science, or B.E/B.Tech. Specific qualifications vary by post.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for MoEF&CC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the MoEF&CC consultant posts will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Can retired government employees apply for these posts?
faq.answer: Yes, retired government employees with a grade pay of Rs 4600/- and above and knowledge of MS Office are eligible for the Non-Scientific Consultant A post.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' description.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is contractual.
